lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਹਜੁ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਲੈ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: andar sehaj na aaeo sahaje hee lai khaae |
lines.english: Peace does not come to his heart - he is not content to eat what comes his way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖਿ ਲਗੈ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਫਿਰੈ ਅਗੈ ਦੂਣੀ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh lagai ghar ghar firai agai doonee milai sajaae |
lines.english: Afflicted with pain, he wanders from house to house, and in the world hereafter, he receives double punishment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠਿ ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਮੰਗਣਾ ਲੈਣਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਮਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manahatth jis te manganaa lainaa dukh manaae |
lines.english: With his stubborn mind, he begs, and grabs, and annoys those who give.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਭੇਖੈ ਥਾਵਹੁ ਗਿਰਹੋ ਭਲਾ ਜਿਥਹੁ ਕੋ ਵਰਸਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis bhekhai thaavahu giraho bhalaa jithahu ko varasaae |
lines.english: Instead of wearing these beggar's robes, it is better to be a householder, and give to others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਤਿਨਾ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad rate tinaa sojhee pee doojai bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the Word of the Shabad, acquire understanding; the others wander, deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਇਐ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: peiai kirat kamaavanaa kahanaa kachhoo na jaae |
lines.english: They act according to their past actions; it is useless to talk to them.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਭਲੇ ਜਿਨ ਕੀ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਥਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jo tis bhaaveh se bhale jin kee pat paaveh thaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are pleasing unto the Lord are good; He upholds their honor. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seviai sadaa sukh janam maran dukh jaae |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, one finds a lasting peace; the pains of birth and death are removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਹੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਬੁਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar teerath giaan hai satigur deea bujhaae |
lines.english: Deep within himself, is the sacred shrine of spiritual wisdom, revealed by the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿੰਤਾ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: chintaa mool na hovee achint vasai man aae |
lines.english: He is not troubled by anxiety, and the carefree Lord comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲੁ ਗਈ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਆ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰਿ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mail gee man niramal hoaa amrit sar teerath naae |
lines.english: His filth is removed, and his soul becomes immaculately pure, bathing in the sacred shrine, the pool of Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣ ਮਿਲੇ ਸਜਣਾ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sajan mile sajanaa sachai sabad subhaae |
lines.english: The friend meets with the True Friend, the Lord, through the love of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਛੋਡਈ ਲੈ ਜਾਸੀ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paakhandd jamakaal na chhoddee lai jaasee pat gavaae |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not leave the hypocrite; he is led away in dishonor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਪਰਚਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ghar hee parachaa paaeaa jotee jot milaae |
lines.english: Within the home of his own being, he finds the Divine Self, and his light blends with the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਜਾਇ ਬਹਹੁ ਸਤਸੰਗਤੀ ਜਿਥੈ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਿਲੋਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: tit jaae bahahu satasangatee jithai har kaa har naam biloeeai |
lines.english: Go, and sit in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, where the Name of the Lord is churned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate se ubare sache siau liv laae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are imbued with the Naam are saved; they are in love with the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਜਪਿਅਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਢੋਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: nit japiahu har har dinas raat har daragah dtoeeai |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, constantly, day and night, and you shall be accepted in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੇਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਤਤੁ ਨ ਖੋਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje hee har naam lehu har tat na khoeeai |
lines.english: In peace and poise, contemplate the Lord's Name - don't lose the essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੰਉ ਸਭਿ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਲ ਗਲੋਈਐ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: tis gur knau sabh namasakaar karahu jin har kee har gaal galoeeai |4|
lines.english: Let everyone bow in worship to the Guru, who utters the sermon of the Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਗੁਰੂ ਜਿਸੁ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲਿਲਾਟਿ ਲਿਖੋਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: so paae pooraa sataguroo jis dhur masatak lilaatt likhoeeai |
lines.english: He alone finds the Perfect True Guru, on whose forehead such a pre-ordained destiny is written.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣ ਮਿਲੇ ਸਜਣਾ ਜਿਨ ਸਤਗੁਰ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sajan mile sajanaa jin satagur naal piaar |
lines.english: The friends who love the True Guru, meet with the Lord, the True Friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਅਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man hee te man maaniaa gur kai sabad apaar |
lines.english: Their minds are appeased by their own minds, through the incomparable Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਤਿਨੀ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਸਚੈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: mil preetam tinee dhiaaeaa sachai prem piaar |
lines.english: Meeting their Beloved, they meditate on the True Lord with love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਿ ਸਜਣ ਮਿਲੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਜਿ ਆਪਿ ਮੇਲੇ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: ehi sajan mile na vichhurreh ji aap mele karataar |
lines.english: These friends are united, and will not be separated again; they have been united by the Creator Lord Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਈਆ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਕਰਹਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa darasan kee parateet na aaeea sabad na kareh veechaar |
lines.english: Some do not believe in the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan; they do not contemplate the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਵਿਛੁੜੈ ਜਿਨਾ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: vichhurriaa kaa kiaa vichhurrai jinaa doojai bhaae piaar |
lines.english: The separated ones are in love with duality - what more separation can they suffer?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਪਰੀਤੀ ਤੁਟਦੀ ਵਿਲਮੁ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਇਤੁ ਦੋਸਤੀ ਚਲਨਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eis pareetee tuttadee vilam na hovee it dosatee chalan vikaar |
lines.english: This friendship is broken in an instant; this friendship leads to corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਸੇਤੀ ਦੋਸਤੀ ਥੋੜੜਿਆ ਦਿਨ ਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh setee dosatee thorrarriaa din chaar |
lines.english: Friendship with the self-willed manmukhs lasts for only a few short days.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਚੇ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਕਰਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa andar sache kaa bhau naahee naam na kareh piaar |
lines.english: They do not fear the True Lord within their hearts, and they do not love the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਸਿਉ ਕਿਆ ਕੀਚੈ ਦੋਸਤੀ ਜਿ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tin siau kiaa keechai dosatee ji aap bhulaae karataar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, why become friends with those whom the Creator Lord Himself has misled? ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਸਦਾ ਇਕਤੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eik sadaa ikatai rang raheh tin kai hau sad balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: Some remain constantly imbued with the Lord's Love; I am forever a sacrifice to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਐ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਭੁਖ ਸਭ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tin miliaa man santokheeai trisanaa bhukh sabh jaae |
lines.english: Meeting them, the soul is satisfied, and one's hunger and thirst all depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਅਰਪੀ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਨਿਵਿ ਨਿਵਿ ਲਾਗਉ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tan man dhan arapee tin kau niv niv laagau paae |
lines.english: I dedicate my mind, soul and wealth to them; bowing low, I fall at their feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਹਉ ਵਾਰਿਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ਸੁਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis gur kau hau vaariaa jin har kee har kathaa sunaaee |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the Guru, who recites the sermon of the Lord's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੁਖੀਏ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate sukhee sadaa sache siau liv laae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Naam are happy forever; they lovingly focus their minds on the True Lord. ||2||
